sourceTitle: Generative AI Hub | Teaching & Learning — UCL
evidenceSnippetOriginal: UCL offers a service called Studiosity to support students with their academic writing and referencing skills. The platform uses GenAI and is available 24/7 to all current students, at all levels of study.
